calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-29-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-29-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Irving Pfeffer, Clerk Carla Contreras, Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
Amanda Heier, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Mary Elizabeth Inn.
Attorney, John P. Zanghi, representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Eliyana Scott is present.
Attorney, Katie Danielson, representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was filed.

This case settled, the trial date of 11-03-08 is vacated.
